SEO.TITLE: Portfolio Maickol Rivera | Web Developer and Designer
SEO.DESCRIPTION: Software Developer and UX/UI Designer, focused on transforming problems and ideas into innovative solutions, and connecting users with unique experiences.

HERO.SLOGAN: Web Developer and UI/UX Designer. It's time to build something unique!

PROJECTS.TITLE: PROJECTS
PROJECTS.DESCRIPTION: Over a year developing software independently, exploring all kinds of projects—from landing pages and cross-platform applications to 3D interactions with Three.js and a multi-encryption tool. Always looking for ways to innovate and learn.
PROJECTS.NEWFOCUS_DESCRIPTION: Langing Page of New Focus. Application dedicated to promoting healthy and productive habits in the daily lives of its users.
PROJECTS.SOLARSISTEM_DESCRIPTION: Interactive simulation of the solar system, developed with Three.js. It allows visualization of the planets rotating on their axes and orbiting around the Sun.
PROJECTS.REKRYPT_DESCRIPTION: An online tool that allows you to transform text using multiple encryption, encoding, and hashing methods in sequence.

ABOUT.TITLE: ABOUT ME
ABOUT.TEXT_1: Software Developer and UX/UI Designer, focused on transforming problems and ideas into innovative solutions, and connecting users with unique experiences.
ABOUT.TEXT_2: I began my journey in Web Development at the age of 15, accumulating experience in various projects, such as the design and development of websites, cross-platform mobile applications, and 3D design.
